title: Remove Bad Pairs from a String
shortDescription: Remove bad pairs from a string. A bad pair is defined as adjacent characters that are the same letter in different cases (e.g., 'xX'). Implement a solution to remove these bad pairs.

Remove Bad Pairs from a String

Remove bad pairs from a string. A bad pair is defined as adjacent characters that are the same letter in different cases (e.g., 'xX'). Implement a solution to remove these bad pairs.
